business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Part of Commercial Property coverage (Form CP 00 10 10 12)
Business Income And Extra Expense Coverage Form CP 15 08 (10 12)
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12) - Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12) - water, communication, and power supply services
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88) - suspends Coinsurance Additional Condition
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12) - covers mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

positives: Agreed Value endorsement in place suspending coinsurance requirement
Business Income and Extra Expense coverage in place
concerns: Vacancy condition - coverage reduced if building vacant more than 60 consecutive days

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Commercial Property policy for Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC covering industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Total premium $424,883.27. Building limit $146,260,000; Contents $42,495,000; Business Income $62,590,000; 80% coinsurance; $75,000 deductible.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio (SIC Code 6512).
